column1: Every exercise has at least three prepared alternatives, listed best first. Tier 1 is a true like for like swap from the same substitution group. Tier 2 is a same muscle group swap, used when a user simply dislikes or cannot access the movement. Advanced lifts always list an easier swap first.

column4: Substitutions (Best First)
